controls.control_objective: To ensure issue directions to authorised persons through a
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that, whenever necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to Authorised
Persons through A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue directions to authorised persons through a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amended suitably simultaneously
controls.control_description:
The Master Direction issued herewith shall be amended suitably
simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amended suitably simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure be remitted outside india or credited to nre/fcnr(b)/nrnr account of the borrower
controls.control_description:
The loan amount shall not be remitted outside India or credited to
NRE/FCNR(B)/NRNR account of the borrower;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be remitted outside india or credited to nre/fcnr(b)/nrnr account of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be duly complied with
controls.control_description:
The directives of RBI on such loans and directives on advances against
shares/securities/immovable property shall be duly complied with;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be duly complied with

controls.control_objective: To ensure be either by inward remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/nro/fcnr(b)/nrnr/nrsr account of the borrower and/or out of sale proceeds realise
controls.control_description:
The repayment of loan should be either by inward remittance from outside India or
by debit to NRE/NRO/FCNR(B)/NRNR/NRSR account of the borrower and/or out
of sale proceeds realised through securities offered for the loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be either by inward remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/nro/fcnr(b)/nrnr/nrsr account of the borrower and/or out of sale proceeds realise

controls.control_objective: To ensure also grant inr loans to nri for any other purpose provided it is as per the board approval policy of the authorised dealer and loan proceeds are not u
controls.control_description:
Subject to aforesaid terms and conditions and with additional requirements like
compliance with applicable prudential norms of the RBI, authorised dealer may
also grant INR loans to NRI for any other purpose provided it is as per the board
approval policy of the authorised dealer and loan proceeds are not used for
investment in capital market including margin trading and derivatives.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also grant inr loans to nri for any other purpose provided it is as per the board approval policy of the authorised dealer and loan proceeds are not u

controls.control_objective: To ensure happen by remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/fcnr(b)/nro account
controls.control_description:
Repayment
of the loan shall happen by remittance from outside India or by debit to
NRE/FCNR(B)/NRO account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to happen by remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/fcnr(b)/nro account

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant inr loan to nri employees of indian companies for acquiring shares of the companies under the employees stock option (esop) scheme subject to th
controls.control_description:
3.2 Lending for acquiring shares under the Employees Stock Option Plan: An
Authorised Dealer in India may grant INR loan to NRI employees of Indian companies for
acquiring shares of the companies under the Employees Stock Option (ESOP) Scheme
subject to the following terms and conditions:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant inr loan to nri employees of indian companies for acquiring shares of the companies under the employees stock option (esop) scheme subject to th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the policy approved by the board of the authorised dealer and shall be subjected to capital market exposure norms of the rbi and other prude
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the policy approved by the board of the authorised dealer and shall be subjected to capital market exposure norms of the rbi and other prude

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 90 per cent of the purchase price of the shares or inr 20 lakhs per nri employee, whichever is lower
controls.control_description:
The loan amount should not exceed 90 per cent of the purchase price of the
shares or INR 20 lakhs per NRI employee, whichever is lower;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 90 per cent of the purchase price of the shares or inr 20 lakhs per nri employee, whichever is lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the banks
controls.control_description:
The rate of interest and margin on such loans may be decided by the banks,
subject to directives issued by the RBI from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by the banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid directly to the company and should not be credited to the borrowers’ non-resident accounts in india
controls.control_description:
The amount shall be paid directly to the company and should not be credited to the
borrowers’ non-resident accounts in India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid directly to the company and should not be credited to the borrowers’ non-resident accounts in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be repaid by way of inward remittances from outside india or by debit to nro/nre/fcnr(b) account of the borrower
controls.control_description:
The loan amount shall be repaid by way of inward remittances from outside India
or by debit to NRO/NRE/FCNR(B) account of the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be repaid by way of inward remittances from outside india or by debit to nro/nre/fcnr(b) account of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide housing loan to a nri or a pio for acquisition of a residential accommodation in india subject to the following terms and conditions: i
controls.control_description:
Lending in INR by an authorised dealer or a housing finance institution to
NRI/PIO for housing purpose
An authorised or a housing finance institution in India approved by the National Housing
Bank (NHB) may provide housing loan to a NRI or a PIO for acquisition of a residential
accommodation in India subject to the following terms and conditions:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide housing loan to a nri or a pio for acquisition of a residential accommodation in india subject to the following terms and conditions: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at par with those applicable to housing finance provided to a person resident in india
controls.control_description:
The quantum of loans, margin money and the period of repayment shall be at par
with those applicable to housing finance provided to a person resident in  India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at par with those applicable to housing finance provided to a person resident in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited to nre/fcnr(b)/nrnr account of the borrower
controls.control_description:
The loan amount shall not be credited to NRE/FCNR(B)/NRNR account of the
borrower;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited to nre/fcnr(b)/nrnr account of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully secured by equitable mortgage of the property proposed to be acquired, and if necessary, also by lien on the borrower's other assets in india
controls.control_description:
The loan shall be fully secured by equitable mortgage of the property proposed to
be acquired, and if necessary, also by lien on the borrower's other assets in India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully secured by equitable mortgage of the property proposed to be acquired, and if necessary, also by lien on the borrower's other assets in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid by remittances from outside india or out of funds in nre/ fcnr(b)/ nrnr/ nro/ nrsr account of the borrower or out of rental income derived fro
controls.control_description:
The instalment of loan, interest and other charges, if any, shall be paid by
remittances from outside India or out of funds in NRE/ FCNR(B)/ NRNR/ NRO/
NRSR account of the borrower or out of rental income derived from renting out the
property acquired or by any relative of the borrower in India by crediting the
borrower's loan account through account to account transfer;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid by remittances from outside india or out of funds in nre/ fcnr(b)/ nrnr/ nro/ nrsr account of the borrower or out of rental income derived fro

controls.control_objective: To ensure conform to the directives issued
controls.control_description:
The rate of interest on the loan shall conform to the directives issued, if any, by the
RBI and/ or NHB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conform to the directives issued

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant rupee loan to its nri/pio employees subject to the following terms and conditions: i
controls.control_description:
INR loans by Indian body corporate to its NRI/PIO employees
A body corporate registered or incorporated in India may grant rupee loan to its NRI/PIO
employees subject to the following terms and conditions:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant rupee loan to its nri/pio employees subject to the following terms and conditions: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted only for personal purposes including purchase of housing property in india
controls.control_description:
The loan shall be granted only for personal purposes including purchase of
housing property in India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted only for personal purposes including purchase of housing property in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted in accordance with the lender's staff welfare scheme/staff housing loan scheme and other terms and conditions applicable to its staff resid
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted in accordance with the lender's staff welfare scheme/staff housing loan scheme and other terms and conditions applicable to its staff resid

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the loan amount is not used for the purposes mentioned under 2
controls.control_description:
The lender shall ensure that the loan amount is not used for the purposes
mentioned under 2.1.3 above;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the loan amount is not used for the purposes mentioned under 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure credit the loan amount to the borrower's nro account or shall ensure credit to such account by specific indication on the payment instrument
controls.control_description:
The lender shall credit the loan amount to the borrower's NRO account or shall
ensure credit to such account by specific indication on the payment instrument;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to credit the loan amount to the borrower's nro account or shall ensure credit to such account by specific indication on the payment instrument

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made only by way of remittance from outside india or from nre/nro/fcnr(b) account of the borrower and by no other source
controls.control_description:
The repayment of loan shall be made only by way of remittance from outside India
or from NRE/NRO/FCNR(B) account of the borrower and by no other source.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made only by way of remittance from outside india or from nre/nro/fcnr(b) account of the borrower and by no other source

controls.control_objective: To ensure be inbuilt in the loan agreement
controls.control_description:
This
condition shall be inbuilt in the loan agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be inbuilt in the loan agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant inr loan to a nri relative by way of crossed cheque/electronic transfer subject to the following terms and conditions: i
controls.control_description:
INR Loans to NRI by Resident Individual
A resident individual may grant INR loan to a NRI relative by way of crossed
cheque/electronic transfer subject to the following terms and conditions:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant inr loan to a nri relative by way of crossed cheque/electronic transfer subject to the following terms and conditions: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the applicable limit is not breached
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to ensure that the applicable limit is not breached

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the provisions given at 2
controls.control_description: The utilisation of loans shall meet the provisions given at 2.1.3.i above;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the provisions given at 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be remitted outside india but shall be credited to the nro account of the borrower
controls.control_description:
The loan amount shall not be remitted outside India but shall be credited to the
NRO account of the borrower;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be remitted outside india but shall be credited to the nro account of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made by way of inward remittances from outside india or by debit to the nro/nre/fcnr(b) account of the borrower or out of the sale proceeds of the
controls.control_description:
Repayment of loan shall be made by way of inward remittances from outside India
or by debit to the NRO/NRE/FCNR(B) account of the borrower or out of the sale
proceeds of the shares or securities or immovable property against which such
loan was granted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made by way of inward remittances from outside india or by debit to the nro/nre/fcnr(b) account of the borrower or out of the sale proceeds of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow continuance of loan/overdraft till its original maturity subject to the satisfaction of the lender
controls.control_description:
7.1 Change of status of borrower to a person resident outside India: In case of
change of status of a borrower who has taken Rupee loan/overdraft from an authorised
dealer bank, from a person resident in India to a person resident outside India, the
authorised dealer bank may allow continuance of loan/overdraft till its original maturity
subject to the satisfaction of the lender.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow continuance of loan/overdraft till its original maturity subject to the satisfaction of the lender

controls.control_objective: To ensure be out of inward remittance from outside india or from nre/fcnr(b)/nrnr/nro/nrsr account of the borrower
controls.control_description:
So long as the borrower continues to remain a
person resident outside India, the repayment shall be out of inward remittance from
outside India or from NRE/FCNR(B)/NRNR/NRO/NRSR account of the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be out of inward remittance from outside india or from nre/fcnr(b)/nrnr/nro/nrsr account of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made by credit to the nro account of the lender
controls.control_description:
7.2 Change of the status of the lender to a person resident outside India: In case a
rupee loan was granted by a person resident in India to another person resident in India
and the lender subsequently becomes a person resident outside India, the repayment of
the loan by the resident borrower should be made by credit to the NRO account of the
lender.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made by credit to the nro account of the lender

controls.control_objective: To ensure permit a temporary overdraft, for value not exceeding inr five hundred lakhs, in inr accounts maintained with him by its branches or correspondents or head office outside india
controls.control_description:
Overdraft by Authorised Dealer to its Branches/Correspondent Banks/Head
Office outside India
An authorised dealer may permit a temporary overdraft, for value not exceeding INR five
hundred lakhs, in INR accounts maintained with him by its branches or correspondents or
Head Office outside India, subject to such terms and conditions as the Reserve Bank
may direct from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit a temporary overdraft, for value not exceeding inr five hundred lakhs, in inr accounts maintained with him by its branches or correspondents or head office outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of calculating the ceiling of INR five
hundred lakhs, the aggregate amount of overdrafts permitted by the authorised dealer to
all his branches, correspondents and Head Office outside India shall be taken into
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account

controls.control_objective: To ensure borrow in inr from nris/pios under the following two routes:
controls.control_description:
2.1 Available routes for borrowing: Persons resident in Indian may borrow in INR from NRIs/PIOs under the
following two routes:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to borrow in inr from nris/pios under the following two routes:

controls.control_objective: To ensure borrow in inr from nris/pios after satisfying the following terms and conditions: i
controls.control_description:
2.1.1 Borrowing in INR by persons other than companies in India: A person resident in India, not being a
company incorporated in India, may borrow in INR from NRIs/PIOs after satisfying the following terms and
conditions:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to borrow in inr from nris/pios after satisfying the following terms and conditions: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be only on a non-repatriation basis
controls.control_description: Borrowing shall be only on a non-repatriation basis;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be only on a non-repatriation basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be received either by inward remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/nro/fcnr(b)/nrnr/nrsr account of the lender, maintained with an authoris
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be received either by inward remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/nro/fcnr(b)/nrnr/nrsr account of the lender, maintained with an authoris

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 3 years
controls.control_description: Period of loan shall not exceed 3 years;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 3 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than two per cent above bank rate prevailing on the date of availment of loan
controls.control_description:
Rate of interest on the loan shall not be more than two per cent above Bank Rate prevailing on the date
of availment of loan;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than two per cent above bank rate prevailing on the date of availment of loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made only to the nro account of the lender
controls.control_description: Payment of interest and repayment of principal shall be made only to the NRO account of the lender.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made only to the nro account of the lender

controls.control_objective: To ensure borrow in inr, on repatriation or non-repatriation basis, from nris/pios after satisfying the following terms and conditions: i
controls.control_description:
2.1.2 Borrowing in INR by companies in India: A company incorporated in India may borrow in INR, on repatriation
or non-repatriation basis, from NRIs/PIOs after satisfying the following terms and conditions:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to borrow in inr, on repatriation or non-repatriation basis, from nris/pios after satisfying the following terms and conditions: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure : a
controls.control_description:
Borrowing company does not and shall not:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than three years
controls.control_description: Period of loan shall not be less than three years;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than three years

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the ceiling prescribed for issue of equity shares/convertible debentures for foreign direct investment in india
controls.control_description:
If the borrowing is on repatriation basis then the percentage of NCDs issued to NRIs/PIOs to the total paid
up value of all NCDs issued shall not exceed the ceiling prescribed for issue of equity shares/convertible
debentures for foreign direct investment in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed the ceiling prescribed for issue of equity shares/convertible debentures for foreign direct investment in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 10 received through inward remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/fcnr (b) account of the investor maintained with an authorised dealer o
controls.control_description:
Further, the funds towards borrowing should be
10
received through inward remittance from outside India or by debit to NRE/FCNR (B) account of the
investor maintained with an authorised dealer or an authorised bank in India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 10 received through inward remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/fcnr (b) account of the investor maintained with an authorised dealer o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be received either by inward remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/nro/fcnr(b)/nrnr/nrsr account of the investor maintained with an authori
controls.control_description:
If the borrowing is on non-repatriation basis from NRIs/PIOs then the amount of loan should be received
either by inward remittance from outside India or by debit to NRE/NRO/FCNR(B)/NRNR/NRSR account of
the investor maintained with an authorised dealer or an authorised bank in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be received either by inward remittance from outside india or by debit to nre/nro/fcnr(b)/nrnr/nrsr account of the investor maintained with an authori

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made only to the nro account of the lender
controls.control_description:
Payment of interest
and repayment of principal shall be made only to the NRO account of the lender.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made only to the nro account of the lender

controls.control_objective: To ensure be utilised only for the own business of the borrower other than what is mentioned at 2
controls.control_description:
The proceeds shall be utilised only for the own business of the borrower other than what is mentioned at
2.1.2.i above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be utilised only for the own business of the borrower other than what is mentioned at 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for investment or for on-lending in any manner whatsoever
controls.control_description: The proceeds shall not be used for investment or for on-lending in any manner whatsoever.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for investment or for on-lending in any manner whatsoever

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, permit these borrowers to use the amount so borrowed for on-lending to infrastructure sector or to keep them in fixed deposits with banks i
controls.control_description:
The Reserve
Bank may, however, permit these borrowers to use the amount so borrowed for on-lending to
infrastructure sector or to keep them in fixed deposits with banks in India, pending utilisation for
permissible end-uses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, permit these borrowers to use the amount so borrowed for on-lending to infrastructure sector or to keep them in fixed deposits with banks i

controls.control_objective: To ensure file with the nearest office of the rbi, not later than 30 days from the date of: 2
controls.control_description:
2.2 Reporting Requirements: For borrowing under 2.1.2 above, the borrowing company should file with the
nearest office of the RBI, not later than 30 days from the date of:
2.2.1 
Receipt of remittance for investment in NCDs, full details of the remittances received, viz., (a) a list
containing names and addresses of NRIs who have remitted funds for investment on repatriation and/or non-
repatriation basis, (b) amount and date of receipt of remittance and its rupee equivalent;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to file with the nearest office of the rbi, not later than 30 days from the date of: 2
